Mentions Timeline (1 articles)
3306-11-26
Alliance Consolidates Presence in Coalsack Nebula
The Alliance opens four new starports in the Coalsack Nebula following their successful campaign. Betancourt Base requests Thargoid commodities for xenobiological research led by Dr. Rodion Stathos, funded by pharmaceutical and bioengineering companies.
